title: Sweet HUD
description: A new HUD in a sweet style..Sweeeeet
body:
The resource pack changes the HUD. Makes the interface "sweet". The color palette and the idea are taken from the game "Slime Rancher 2".

![ 0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4726903a433e2d26c5979f4374f6deab41a2176a.png)

if there is a flaw in the version, write to folsstoll@gmail.com indicating the modification, version, and issue.
